title: SUCCESS: 2026-06-22: Successfully optimized the Mac Mini by closing memory-heavy applications (Comet) to free up 4.1GB of RAM,...
content: Approach: 2026-06-22: Successfully optimized the Mac Mini by closing memory-heavy applications (Comet) to free up 4.1GB of RAM, and executed the yolo-safeguards sim-runaway-guard.sh script to verify system safeguards. Memory free percentage increased to 56% and load averages are dropping.
